title: Growth Mindset Nuance
script_summary: Exploring the complexity of growth mindset through scientific insights.

segments.voiceover: Here's what science actually says about growth mindset nuance.
Most think a growth mindset means believing you can improve, but it’s more layered.
Research shows, it’s also about knowing when to apply effort versus when to pivot.
A 2020 study highlighted that flexibility in mindset can lead to better outcomes.
Understanding this nuance can transform how you approach challenges. It’s not just about grit!
Want to dive deeper? Follow for more insights on mindset and growth!
